epigraph.quote: all we had was mown grass & owls

moments.quote: Sensible people fell into bed + Charles + Jenny + John went off to the pub.
Tinder had a wild run around with Conta's dogs. Iona wonders if he could breed with Willow.
You could view the land for miles around at the top of the house, cupola balcony.

images.caption: Web Member Adult, Tour Date: 08 Jun 2014

moments.quote: The new visitors' centre, opened in the last 12 months, is very good. Light + airy.
George Herbert, West Front, Salisbury Cath[edral]

images.caption: George Herbert, West Front, Salisbury Cath

moments.quote: The village has huge water meadows, which used to be flooded every winter to keep them fertile.

moments.place: Farm campsite near Bemerton, Salisbury, UK
moments.quote: As dusk fell there was a raucous noise from the oak tree next to us. Screeching, murder, mayhem.

images.caption: Bemerton Church Window - Ferrar and Herbert

moments.quote: She watches the TV, Wimbledon, from behind a silk parasol because of the sun's glare.
